name: public_safety_communications_outage_millhaven_auto_ben
premise: A drone-as-first-responder feed captured a domestic incident; privacy policy never contemplated livestreaming to supervisors. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety communications outage millhaven auto ben has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Counsel insists any public statement match what is already provable from retained logs, not what leadership believes is true. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both autonomy and beneficence; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Ravi Kaur
agents.identity: I am Ravi Kaur, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat beneficence as disposable collateral every time autonomy spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Gideon Kim
agents.identity: I am Gideon Kim, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so autonomy cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes beneficence in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on beneficence.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on beneficence for immediate traction on autonomy.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ravi Kaur must choose under autonomy versus beneficence. What does Ravi Kaur do?
